description: Style Note Inspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear) Product Details Round earring with pearl like embellishments and a black stone in the centre Has a black bead dangler Has a earring post and back closure Material and Care Gold plated metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dust Size Length: 6 cm
